title: Lists, Tuples, Ranges, and Comprehensions
description: Model and transform ordered service records while preserving aliasing and order requirements. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of an ordered service-record processor while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose mutable and immutable sequence types from ownership and update needs.
Use indexing, slicing, sorting, copying, and comprehensions without aliasing surprises.
Analyze sequence cost under realistic data sizes.
